flagged.reason: unknown file at root — `cat 0` to inspect; then delete or move to docs/
unclear origin — if Turborepo-generated: add to .gitignore and delete; if manually curated: move to docs/
check railway.toml startCommand and Dockerfile CMD; if this IS the server entry, keep; if stale, archive to internal/archive/
'r3audit' — `cat r3audit` to inspect; if still in use, move to scripts/; if not, archive
'r3execute' — `cat r3execute` to inspect; if still in use, move to scripts/; if not, archive
'r3setup' — `cat r3setup` to inspect; if still in use, move to scripts/; if not, archive
client/client/ nested dir should not exist — inspect vs client/src/; if duplicate, delete
client/components/ outside client/src/ — confirm src/components/ is the live version, then delete this copy
client/hooks/ outside client/src/ — confirm src/hooks/ is the live version, then delete this copy
client/stores/ outside client/src/ — confirm src/stores/ is the live version, then delete this copy
client/shared/ outside client/src/ — workspace shared/ package is canonical; this is likely a stale copy
root-level src/ should not exist in a monorepo — compare with client/src/engine/ and client/src/visual/; if duplicate, delete; if canonical, move to the correct package
LLPTE package declaration sitting in shared/ — should come from packages/llpte-signal via package.json#exports; fix package exports, then delete this file
'patch' in filename implies a temporary fix applied inline — verify contents are merged into schema.ts; if so, delete; if still needed permanently, rename to remove 'patch'
